testcase.name: testParcourAchatComplet
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.cssSelector: .checkout-button, a.checkout-button, .wc-proceed-to-checkout a (tried for 40 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.27.0', revision: 'd6e718d134' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '17.0.19' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 148.0.7778.217, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 148.0.7778.178 (d096af1c9e9..., userDataDir: C:\Users\amara\AppData\Loca...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:49684}, goog:processID: 23212, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: none, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:49684/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 148.0.7778.217, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 5149013188c6f2f4396ef9adce340ab9 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at Tests.E2ETest.testParcourAchatComplet(E2ETest.java:97) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1511) ...
